title: × calicharis butcheri
intro: × Calicharis butcheri, also known as butcher's broom, is a flowering plant native to Europe, North Africa, and Western Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, primarily due to the presence of a compound called ruscogenin, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with × Calicharis butcheri include reducing swelling and pain, improving circulation, and supporting cardiovascular health. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as infusions, tinctures, and capsules, are often used to address various health conditions, including varicose veins, hemorrhoids, and arthritis.
